title: Genie Q2 Plan
subtitle: New Ideas, improvements, and new applications

items.name: Filtering Metrics
items.desc: Genie can query metric data with specific filters applied (e.g. segments, dimensions)

items.name: Train Genie
items.desc: Users can add company context, goals, and priorities so Genie tailors answers to their business

items.name: Editing Dashboards
items.desc: Genie can modify existing dashboards, not just create new ones

items.name: Cool! this one is ready to be deleted
items.desc: No description

items.name: Reports (POC)
items.desc: Genie creates full Databox reports with charts, summaries, and text across slides or pages

items.name: Loading Messages Fix
items.desc: Fix streaming bug where switching tabs causes incomplete message delivery

items.name: Design System
items.desc: Unified component library for all Genie UI elements

items.name: CTA in Mail and App
items.desc: Trigger Genie analysis directly from email notifications and in-app CTAs (metrics, databoards)

items.name: Delete Metric / Databoard
items.desc: Users can delete Genie-created metrics and databoards directly from chat cards

items.name: Calculator Tool
items.desc: Dedicated tool for precise calculations like ratios, margins, and custom formulas

items.name: Save Prompts (Library)
items.desc: Save and reuse favorite prompts from a personal prompt library

items.name: Follow Ups
items.desc: Genie suggests relevant follow-up questions after each response

items.name: Voice Dictation
items.desc: Ask Genie questions by voice instead of typing

items.name: Feedback Element
items.desc: Add feedback element at the end of each message that is more visible

items.name: WL Genie App (Branding)
items.desc: Genie on white-label accounts uses neutral branding with no Databox references

items.name: Calculated Metrics
items.desc: Genie can create calculated metrics directly from chat

items.name: Side Panel Genie
items.desc: Genie side panel accessible from every screen in Databox

items.name: Multi Metrics Charts
items.desc: Create charts that combine multiple metrics in a single visualization

items.name: Mobile View Improvements
items.desc: Improved Genie experience on mobile devices

items.name: Dataset Manipulation
items.desc: Add date transformations and calculated columns to datasets

items.name: Pricing
items.desc: Implement Genie's credit-based pricing system with usage info, payments, and limits

items.name: Context & Source Selector with @
items.desc: Select multiple data sources and reference specific metrics, databoards, or sources using @ mentions

items.name: Cross Agency Conversations
items.desc: Agencies can ask Genie questions about a specific client's data from their account

items.name: Persistent Memory
items.desc: Genie remembers context and preferences across conversations

items.name: Slack App
items.desc: Interact with Genie directly from Slack

items.name: File Upload
items.desc: Upload files (Excel, CSV, images) for Genie to analyze directly in chat

items.name: Custom MCP Integrations
items.desc: Connect custom MCP servers to extend Genie with external tools and data

items.name: Artifacts
items.desc: Rich interactive outputs that can replace standalone databoards and reports

items.name: Onboarding
items.desc: AI-guided onboarding flow that walks new users through setup from signup

items.name: GPT App
items.desc: Databox Genie available as an app in the ChatGPT GPT Store

items.name: Web Search
items.desc: Genie can search the web to enrich answers with external context

items.name: WL Genie App (Behavior)
items.desc: White-label partners can create custom Genie agents with limited tools and tailored behavior
